start.text: Yo! Dude, finally got through to you. Been trying to reach you all week

options.text: Yeah sorry man, been dealing with some stuff. What's up?
I know, I know. Things have been rough lately

whats_up.text: Listen, I know things haven't been easy since you lost your job. But I think I finally got something for you

options.text: Marcus, you don't have to keep doing this...
For real? What is it?

things_rough.text: I know man, I know. That's actually why I'm calling. I think I found something that could help

options.text: You've been doing too much for me already dude
Yeah? Tell me more

dont_have_to.text: Bro, shut up. You were there for me. I'm not gonna just watch you struggle. Plus, this is actually perfect for your skills

options.text: Alright alright, what is it?
I appreciate it man, really. But I don't want charity

not_charity.text: It's not charity, it's a real job. I wouldn't recommend you if I didn't think you could do it. Come on, just hear me out

options.text: Fine, fine. What's the job?

the_opportunity.text: So, there's this detective I know. Rodriguez. Good guy. They need someone to help with their digital evidence systems. You know, databases, file management, that kind of thing

options.text: Wait, like working for the police?
That actually sounds cool. Tell me more
I don't know man, that sounds intense

working_police.text: Yeah, basically. But it's mostly backend stuff, you won't be out chasing criminals or anything lol. Just maintaining their systems, organizing case files. Pays decent too

options.text: I mean... I guess I could do that
That's actually kind of interesting
I don't know if I'm qualified for that

sounds_intense.text: Nah, it's not like that. It's mostly just IT work, but with cooler stories to tell at parties haha. Plus you'd be helping catch bad guys indirectly. That's gotta count for something

options.text: When you put it that way... yeah, okay
I'm still not sure I'm the right person

not_qualified.text: Dude, you're literally overqualified. You were doing way more complex stuff at your old job. This is easy for you, trust me. And Rodriguez is cool, he's not gonna grill you or anything

options.text: Alright, you've convinced me. What do I need to do?
I appreciate the confidence boost, but...

sounds_cool.text: Right? I thought you'd be into it. Plus it's stable, benefits, all that adult stuff we're supposed to care about now lol

options.text: Benefits would be nice... okay I'm in
How'd you even get this connection?

could_do_that.text: Hell yeah you could. You're smart as hell, don't let the layoff mess with your confidence. You got this

options.text: Thanks man. So what's the next step?
How do you even know this detective?

how_connection.text: Oh, weird story actually. He goes to the same rock climbing gym as me. We got to talking one day and he mentioned they needed tech help. Told him I knew the perfect person

options.text: You really went out of your way for this. Thanks bro
Alright, I'm sold. Let's do it

still_hesitant.text: Look, I get it. Starting over is scary. But you can't just sit around waiting for the perfect thing to fall in your lap. This is a good opportunity. Real talk

options.text: You're right. Okay, I'll do it
I need to think about it

thanks_bro.text: That's what friends are for man. You'd do the same for me. Actually, you DID do the same for me when I was crashing on your couch after the divorce

options.text: That was different, you were going through something
Alright, enough with the sentimental stuff. What's next?

going_through_something.text: And you're not? Dude, losing your job sucks. Let me help. That's what we do. So are you in or what?

options.text: Yeah. Yeah, I'm in

need_think.text: Fair enough. But don't think too long, Rodriguez wants to fill this position soon. Just... think about it, okay? I really think this could be good for you

options.text: Actually, you know what? Let's do it. I'm in
I will. Thanks for thinking of me

convinced.text: YES! Okay cool, I'll text Rodriguez right now. He'll probably reach out in the next day or two to set something up

options.text: Sounds good. Thanks again Marcus, seriously
What should I expect from him?

expect_rodriguez.text: He's pretty straightforward, professional but not uptight. Probably just wants to make sure you're competent and not a weirdo lol. You'll be fine

options.text: Alright, I can handle that

final_thanks.text: Don't mention it bro. Hey, once you get that first paycheck, drinks are on you though haha

options.text: Deal. You got it
Obviously. I owe you big time

deal.text: Perfect. Alright man, I gotta run. Good luck with Rodriguez!

options.text: Thanks Marcus. Talk soon

owe_big.text: Nah, we're even. Just pay it forward when you're back on your feet, yeah? That's all I ask

options.text: You got it. Catch you later

declined.text: Alright man, no pressure. But seriously, don't wait too long. And hey, if you need anything else, you know where to find me

options.text: I appreciate it. Talk to you later

end.text: Later dude. Take care of yourself

start.text: This the number Marcus gave me?

options.text: Yeah, that's me. You must be Detective Rodriguez
Yes, hi. Marcus told me you'd be reaching out

thats_me.text: Good. Marcus speaks highly of you. Says you've got solid experience with database systems and file management

options.text: I appreciate him vouching for me. What's the position exactly?
Yeah, I've worked with that stuff for a few years now

marcus_told.text: He did, did he? Well, he's got good things to say about your technical skills. I'm looking for someone to help maintain our evidence management system

options.text: What would that involve?
I have experience with similar systems

worked_years.text: That's what I need to hear. This isn't rocket science, but it needs to be done right. Chain of custody matters, data integrity matters

options.text: I understand. I'm detail-oriented with that kind of work
What exactly would I be responsible for?

position_details.text: Maintaining our digital evidence system. File organization, database queries, access logs, that kind of thing. Some cases are active, some are cold. All of it needs proper documentation

options.text: That sounds manageable. What are the hours like?
I'd have access to actual case files?

detail_oriented.text: Good. Because one mistake and evidence becomes inadmissible. Can't have that. You comfortable working with sensitive information?

options.text: Absolutely. I take confidentiality seriously
Yes. What kind of information are we talking about?

case_access.text: Within reason, yes. You'd see case files, evidence logs, reports. It's all confidential. Goes without saying you can't discuss any of it outside work

options.text: Of course, I understand
That's actually kind of interesting. What kind of cases?

what_cases.text: Homicides mostly. That's my department. Some solved, some not. You'd be helping keep everything organized and accessible when we need it

options.text: Got it. I can handle that

confidentiality.text: Good. Standard hours, decent pay, benefits after 90 days. Background check required obviously. That a problem?

options.text: No problem at all
Nope, clean record. When would I start?

hours_pay.text: Nine to five, Monday through Friday. Occasional overtime if we're working something urgent. Pay's competitive for the work. Benefits after probation period

options.text: That works for me. What's next?
Sounds fair. I'm interested

no_problem.text: Alright. I'll send you the application and background check forms. Fill those out, get them back to me by end of week. If everything checks out, you can start Monday after next

options.text: Perfect. I'll get those to you ASAP
Sounds good. Thanks for the opportunity

when_start.text: Pending background check, couple weeks. I'll send you the paperwork. Get it back to me by Friday and we can move forward

options.text: Will do. Thank you

whats_next.text: Background check paperwork. I'll email it over. Once that clears, you're in. Should take about a week

options.text: Great, I'll watch for that email

interested.text: Good. I'll send you the application forms. Need them back by Friday if you want to start in two weeks

options.text: You got it. Thanks Detective

final_accept.text: Marcus was right about you. Seems like a good fit. Welcome aboard

options.text: Thank you. Looking forward to it

end.text: See you in a couple weeks
